tasks.text:
Algorithm Backtesting & Automation Pipeline

GOAL: Transparent, step-by-step backtesting with full documentation, then deploy to VPS with alerts.

PHASE 1: BACKTEST DOCUMENTATION
- Document the complete algorithm (power law model, halving cycles, factor importance)
- Create step-by-step backtest methodology with contextual links
- Show all data sources, parameters, and assumptions
- Generate visual results (equity curves, drawdowns, win rates)
- Link to relevant research files in ~/Vaults/openclaw/knowledge/bitcoin/

PHASE 2: RESULTS & TRANSPARENCY
- Publish backtest results with full methodology
- Include walk-forward validation (out-of-sample testing)
- Document any overfitting checks performed
- Create public-facing summary for bitcoinmachinelearning.com

PHASE 3: VPS DEPLOYMENT
- Set up VPS (DigitalOcean/Vultr/Linode)
- Deploy algorithm with automated daily runs
- Configure alerts (Telegram, email) for:
  - Buy/sell signals
  - Model deviation alerts
  - System health checks
- Set up logging and monitoring dashboard

PHASE 4: AUTOMATION
- Cron jobs for daily data fetching
- Automated report generation
- Alert thresholds configuration
- Failover and recovery procedures

DELIVERABLES:
1. Backtest report (PDF + web)
2. Methodology documentation (linked in Obsidian)
3. VPS deployment script
4. Alert configuration
5. Monitoring dashboard
Phase 1: Document algorithm & backtest methodology - Create step-by-step docs with links to power law model, halving cycles, factor importance research
Phase 2: Run backtest & publish results - Walk-forward validation, equity curves, drawdowns, overfitting checks, public summary
Phase 3: VPS deployment - Set up server, deploy algorithm, configure Telegram/email alerts for signals and health
Phase 4: Automation & monitoring - Cron jobs, automated reports, alert thresholds, failover procedures, monitoring dashboard
1. Site Restructuring - Change default tab to Solar+Battery, Battery second, Solar third

tasks.text:
P0: Sign up for affiliate programs

CRITICAL - Enables all affiliate revenue

Programs to apply:
1. Amazon Associates: https://affiliate-program.amazon.com
2. EcoFlow (3-8%): https://www.ecoflow.com/us/affiliate-program
3. Jackery (5-10%): https://www.jackery.com/pages/affiliate-program
4. Anker SOLIX: Contact anker.com
5. Bluetti (5-8%): https://www.bluettipower.com/pages/affiliate

After approval:
- Update scripts/deal-sync.js with affiliate IDs
- Update affiliate tags in pluginSolarAdvisor.js
- Verify all Amazon ASINs work

Ref: ~/Vaults/openclaw/agents/memory/energyscout-ceo/briefs/revenue-roadmap-2026-q2.md

3. Update image paths in pluginSolarAdvisor.js if needed

- EcoFlow Delta 2 Max

- Bluetti AC200MAX

P1: Build blog writing cron job

Architecture:
Cron (weekly) → AI generates blog post → Human review queue → Publish

Technical Plan:
1. Create scripts/blog-generator.js
2. Use Claude API for content generation
3. Output to review queue (Supabase table or local file)
4. energyscout-ceo reviews and publishes

Target SEO Keywords:
- "best portable solar panels 2026"
- "apartment solar options California"
- "solar generator vs gas generator"
- "how much can balcony solar save"
- "PG&E rate increases 2026"

Ref: ~/Vaults/openclaw/agents/memory/energyscout-ceo/briefs/revenue-roadmap-2026-q2.md

P1: Build news bot cron job

Architecture:
Cron (daily) → Fetch solar news → Summarize → Post to /news page

Technical Plan:
1. Create scripts/news-sync.js
2. RSS feed parsing + AI summarization
3. Auto-publish to news section

Sources:
- PV Magazine
- Solar Power World
- Utility Dive
- State energy commission announcements

Ref: ~/Vaults/openclaw/agents/memory/energyscout-ceo/briefs/revenue-roadmap-2026-q2.md

P2: Build social outreach bot

Platforms (Priority Order):
1. Reddit - r/solar, r/homeimprovement, r/frugal (high intent)
2. Twitter/X - Solar community, energy independence crowd
3. YouTube - Video content (longer-term)

Strategy:
- Monitor relevant subreddits for questions we can answer
- Share blog posts with genuine value
- Build reputation before promoting

CAUTION: Must be authentic engagement, not spam. Focus on providing value.

Ref: ~/Vaults/openclaw/agents/memory/energyscout-ceo/briefs/revenue-roadmap-2026-q2.md
